title: 3 Leisure & Recreation Services Stocks Braving Industry Challenges
text: Inflation and economic woes hurt the Leisure & Recreation Services industry. However, stocks like LYV, AMC and RICK appear better positioned to escape industry challenges.

title: Live Nation Entertainment Applauds President Biden's Call for Fee Transparency & Supports FTC Mandating All-in Pricing Nationally
text: LOS ANGELES , Oct. 26, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- We applaud President Biden's advocacy for fee transparency in every industry, including live event ticketing. Live Nation Entertainment advocated for the all-in pricing mandate passed in New York earlier this year, which requires face-value prices and fees to be shown upfront – and we support the FTC mandating this nationally.

title: Even The Hellbent Fed Can't Slow Down These 8 Stocks' Profit
text: Rising rates and a Fed determined to "break the world" is chilling the S&P 500. But some fast-growth companies are powering right through it, analysts say.

title: Live Nation (LYV) Declines 20% in a Year: Is the Worst Over?
text: Live Nation Entertainment (LYV) benefits from pent-up demand, Ticketmaster growth and strong sponsorship.

title: 5 Consumer Discretionary Stocks to Buy Despite Volatility
text: We have narrowed our search to five consumer discretionary stocks. These are: BJ, HRB, LYV, VAC and WWE.

title: FEID SELLS OUT 2022 "U.S. TRIP" SHOW DATES IN JUST MINUTES
text: FEID CONTINUES ENGRAVING HIS NAME ON THE US & GLOBAL CHARTS CLICK HERE TO LISTEN TO "NIEVE" REMIXES EP MIAMI , Oct. 5, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Feid, the indomitable artist who continues to lead the voice of the urban genre around the world, continues leaving his legacy by announcing a complete sell out of his "U.S. TRIP" show dates within minutes of the tickets going out on sale. FERXXO continues his ascension to Latin music superstardom with the announcement of selling out his headline "U.S. TRIP" show dates.

title: INTERNATIONAL CROSSOVER SUPERSTARS IL VOLO TO LIVESTREAM CONCERT BENEFITTING THE RED CROSS AND FLORIDA VICTIMS OF HURRICANE IAN
text: Group partners with VNUE's StageIt to broadcast show from FLA Live Arena, Oct 9th NEW YORK , Oct. 5, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- VNUE, Inc. (OTC:VNUE) announced today that the company has partnered with the Italian superstar trio Il Volo and will be livestreaming the group's concert at FLA Live Arena (Sunrise, FL), October 9 th, 2022, at 8:15 EST, via VNUE's StageIt platform. The trio's performance at FLA Live Arena is produced by Live Nation.
